entity.name: anonyxbiz
entity.description: Creator of Blazeio, a high-performance Python web framework, and AnonyxGhost, a white-label music distribution platform built on it. Passionate about building efficient, scalable, and secure open-source infrastructure.

projects.name: Blazeio
projects.description: A high-performance, zero-copy Python web framework. Features include a transport-layer HTTP server, built-in SQLite3io database server, reverse proxy, real-time events (SharpEvent), and a DOM engine for streaming HTML. Built to enable absolutely everything on the network.

plans.name: Core Support Plan
plans.description: For individuals and companies who rely on Blazeio and want to ensure its continued development and maintenance.

plans.name: Enterprise Support Plan
plans.description: For businesses using Blazeio in production. Includes priority support and direct consulting.

history.description: Blazeio is a passion project. All development is self-funded through AnonyxGhost revenue.
